Procedure.heading: LOCKOUT TAGOUT PROCEDURE
Procedure.snippet: LOCKOUT TAGOUT PROCEDURE Document ID: LOTO-001 Purpose: To ensure equipment is safely isolated before maintenance activities. Procedure: 1. Notify affected personnel. 2. Shut down equipment. 3. Isolate energy sources. 4. Apply lock devices. 5. Apply ...

Maintenance.reason_for_decision: Audit details: matched 5 of 5 subparts. Matched: [SOP], [Schedule], [Logs], [Responsible Team], [Training Record].

SOP.heading: MAINTENANCE PROCEDURE
SOP.snippet: MAINTENANCE PROCEDURE Preventive Maintenance SOP 1. Inspect pumps monthly. 2. Inspect compressors every 90 days. 3. Record maintenance logs. 4. Review maintenance records quarterly. Responsible Department: Maintenance Team

Schedule.heading: MAINTENANCE PROCEDURE
Schedule.snippet: MAINTENANCE PROCEDURE Preventive Maintenance SOP 1. Inspect pumps monthly. 2. Inspect compressors every 90 days. 3. Record maintenance logs. 4. Review maintenance records quarterly. Responsible Department: Maintenance Team

Logs.heading: MAINTENANCE PROCEDURE
Logs.snippet: MAINTENANCE PROCEDURE Preventive Maintenance SOP 1. Inspect pumps monthly. 2. Inspect compressors every 90 days. 3. Record maintenance logs. 4. Review maintenance records quarterly. Responsible Department: Maintenance Team

Responsible Team.heading: MAINTENANCE PROCEDURE
Responsible Team.snippet: MAINTENANCE PROCEDURE Preventive Maintenance SOP 1. Inspect pumps monthly. 2. Inspect compressors every 90 days. 3. Record maintenance logs. 4. Review maintenance records quarterly. Responsible Department: Maintenance Team

Training Record.heading: SECTION 4: TRAINING
Training Record.snippet: All compressors must be inspected every 90 days. Maintenance records must be retained for one year. SECTION 4: TRAINING All employees must receive annual safety training. Training records must be maintained by the HR department. END OF DOCUMENT
